entry.title: Papa Johns Serves Up New Oven-Toasted Sandwiches
entry.summary:
Papa Johns adds sandwiches to its menu with the launch of new Oven-Toasted Sandwiches.
Each sandwich features toasted ciabatta-style bread brushed with the chain's signature Special Garlic Sauce, white American cheese, and new sauces. The lineup includes: - Philly Cheesesteak - Seasoned steak, roasted onions and peppers, pizza ranch, and white American cheese. - Chicken Bacon Ranch - Grilled white-meat chicken, bacon, diced tomatoes, banana peppers, pizza ranch, and white American cheese. - Steak & Mushroom - Seasoned steak, roasted mushrooms and onions, garlic truffle sauce, and white American cheese. Papa Johns Oven‑Toasted Sandwiches are available for a suggested price of $7.99 (it's $8.99 near me in Los Angeles). They're also available for $6.99 each when you buy two or more, and start at $9.49 when paired with any Pepsi-Cola beverage. The new sandwiches bring to mind Domino's similar Oven-Baked Sandwiches, which were launched in 2008 and come in six varieties, including Philly Cheese Steak, Chicken Bacon Ranch, Italian, Chicken Parm, Buffalo Chicken, and Chicken Habanero. Photo via Papa Johns. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New at Burger King: Double Candied Maple Bacon, Egg & Cheese Croissan'wich
entry.summary:
Burger King adds Candied Maple Bacon to its breakfast menu with the arrival of the new Double Candied Maple Bacon, Egg & Cheese Croissan'wich and the new Candied Maple Bacon Burrito Jr.
The Double Candied Maple Bacon, Egg, & Cheese Croissan'wich (pictured) features a double portion of crispy Candied Maple Bacon, eggs, and a slice of American cheese on a toasted croissant. Prices vary with location, but it costs $6.39 near me in Los Angeles. The Candied Maple Bacon Burrito Jr. features four half-strips of Candied Maple Bacon, eggs, American cheese, and hash browns wrapped in a flour tortilla. It's priced at $2.99 near me. Both breakfast items are available now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide. Nutritional Info - Double Candied Maple Bacon, Egg & Cheese Croissan'wich (151g) Calories - 440 Fat - 24g (Saturated Fat - 12g) Sodium - 980mg Carbs - 37g (Sugar - 12g) Protein - 19g Nutritional Info - Candied Maple Bacon Burrito Jr. (153g) Calories - 430 Fat - 22g (Saturated Fat - 8g) Sodium - 1180mg Carbs - 36g (Sugar - 10g) Protein - 19g Photo via Burger King. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Buy-One-Get-One-Free Footlong Deal at Subway from April 1 through April 28, 2026
entry.summary:
Starting Wednesday, April 1, 2026, Subway will be running a limited-time promotion where its Sub Club members can buy a Footlong sub and get one free through April 28, 2026.
The deal is available when ordering via Subway's app and website using the promo code "FLBOGO" at participating locations nationwide. The fine print specifically excludes Fresh Fit, 5 Meat Italian, and Big Hot Pastrami subs from the offer. Photo via Subway. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Debuts New Dubai Dirt Cake Cup and More
entry.summary:
Crumbl introduces its new Dubai Nest Dirt Cake Cup as part of this week's limited-time menu. Also new this week is the Strawberries 'N' Cream Cookie.
Here's what you can expect from Crumbl's weekly rotating menu, available from March 30 through April 4, 2026: - New Dubai Nest Dirt Cake Cup - Layer of chocolate mousse, cookies & cream streusel, and gummy worms, topped with pistachio creme, crispy kataifi, and chocolate candy eggs. - New Strawberries 'N' Cream Cookie - A chilled vanilla cake cookie topped with house-made whipped cream, strawberry jam, and strawberry slices. - Carrot Cake - A two-tiered, lightly-glazed carrot cake made with warm spices, coconut, pineapple, and carrots, layered with vanilla cream cheese frosting and topped with chopped pecans. - Spring M&M's Cookie - A warm classic cookie packed with spring-inspired M&M's candies. The Thursday Thins for this week is the Cake Batter Cookie Thin. Additionally, with April Fools coming up, Crumbl will be serving up its Almost Everything Bagel Sandwich Cookie for one day only on April 1, 2026. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme Commemorates Artemis II Launch with New Donut
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme is set to commemorate NASA's upcoming Artemis II launch on Wednesday, April 1, 2026, by introducing its new Artemis II Donut on Tuesday, March 31, 2026.
The Artemis II Donut features an Original Glazed Donut dipped in blue vanilla‑flavored icing, sprinkled with a mix of crushed Oreo wafers and white nonpareils, finished with a cookies‑and‑cream-flavored buttercreme dollop and a red icing chevron (to evoke the NASA logo) The limited-edition donut will be available through April 2, 2026. It can be purchased individually and in the Artemis II Specialty Dozen, which includes six Artemis II Donuts and six Original Glazed Donuts. The Artemis II mission is a crewed 10-day spaceflight around the moon to test the Orion spacecraft and all of its systems in preparation for a future moon landing. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: KFC Introduces New Box Feasts Ranging from $7 to $11
entry.summary:
KFC welcomes new Box Feasts as limited-time combo meal deals. There are three in all, with prices ranging from $7 to $11. They include:
- $7 Box Feast (pictured) - A KFC Snacker (a new name for the Chicken Little, which can now come on a brioche bun, depending on location), five KFC Nuggets, fries, a medium drink, and a sauce of your choice. - $9 Box Feast - Two KFC Snackers, five KFC Nuggets, fries, a medium drink, and a sauce of your choice. - $11 Box Feast - A Chicken Sandwich, two chicken tenders, fries, a medium drink, and two sauces of your choice. In addition to the new brioche bun for the KFC Snacker, you can now get the mini sandwich with coleslaw and or spicy mayo. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Little Caesars Launches New Four-N-One Stix
entry.summary:
Little Caesars introduces new Four-N-One Stix as a limited-time variant of the chain's Slices-N-Stix.
The new menu item is a large pizza crust with a different flavor in each quarter, cut into 16 breadsticks. The four flavors include cheese, pepperoni, jalapeno, and bacon. It comes with Crazy Sauce for dipping. Four-N-One Stix is priced at $7.99 (may vary) and is Hot-N-Ready for quick pickup from 4 to 8 PM. It can be made to order outside those hours. Little Caesars also adds a limited-time Large Mix-N-Match menu where you can select two or more of the following items for $5.99 each (may vary; it's $6.99 here in California):
Large Classic Cheese Pizza Large Classic Pepperoni Pizza Large Classic Italian Sausage Pizza Large Classic Mushroom Pizza Large Classic Pineapple Pizza Slices-N-Stix Slices-N-Stix Bacon Slices-N-Stix Jalapeno Pretzel Crust with Cheese Sauce & Pepperoni Pretzel Crust with Cheese Sauce & Cheese Pretzel Crust with Pizza Sauce & Pepperoni Pretzel Crust with Pizza Sauce & Cheese Caesar Wings - Oven Roasted Caesar Wings - BBQ Caesar Wings - Buffalo Caesar Wings - Garlic Parmesan
Photo via Little Caesars. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Taco Bell - Mini Taco Salad
entry.summary:
Taco Bell's Mini Taco Salad is part of the chain's Luxe Value Menu. It features seasoned beef, Creamy Chipotle Sauce, shredded cheddar cheese, shredded iceberg lettuce, diced tomatoes, and refried beans in a crispy tortilla bowl.
It cost me $2.79. The salad came in a paper clamshell box. The salad was small and fit neatly in my hand. I stifled the impulse to take a bite as the shell seemed fairly brittle and likely to break, spilling its contents. The shell is made from the same flour-corn tortilla as a Mexican Pizza. It had a lighter, more delicate crunch than the chain's corn tortilla shells.
There was more Creamy Chipotle Sauce on top than was necessary, and I recommend mixing it in before you dig in. It has quite a potent smoky, spicy profile on its own. For a salad, even a mini one, there was a laughable amount of lettuce. There was less lettuce than you'd find in a Taco Bell taco. Along with the tomatoes, it was pretty fresh, though.
The seasoned beef was also a light touch but added a welcome, seasoned meatiness. The most plentiful ingredient was actually the beans, which lined the bottom of the shell. They had a nice, seasoned, savory flavor and provided some chip-and-bean-dip action at the end.
Overall, I liked Taco Bell's Mini Taco Salad a good deal. If you've been missing the chain's tostada, you can consider this a return of it, only with more variety and flavor. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Mini Taco Salad Calories - 280 Fat - 15g (Saturated Fat - 4g) Sodium - 490mg Carbs - 27g (Sugar - 2g) Protein - 9g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme's 2026 Easter Donuts Arrive
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme adopts an Easter basket theme for this year's 2026 Easter donuts. The new Easter Basket Collection includes:
- Easter Egg Basket Donut - An Original Glazed donut piped with vanilla-flavored buttercreme, dipped in decorative green sugar, and topped with an Easter egg sugar piece. - Strawberry Egg Donut - A shell donut filled with white Kreme, dipped in pink strawberry-flavored icing, and decorated with yellow and blue vanilla-flavored icing drizzles. - Baby Chick Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in yellow vanilla-flavored icing and decorated with a baby chick sugar piece. The seasonal donuts are available now for a limited time at participating locations across the US. They can also be found at select retailers in a six-pack. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: KFC Offers 10 Wings for $10 Deal
entry.summary:
Amid March Madness, KFC is offering a deal where you can get either 10 Hot & Spicy wings for $10 or 20 wings for $20 through the KFC mobile app or website for a limited time.
KFC's Hot & Spicy Wings are marinated and double-breaded with its Extra Crispy breading. Prices vary, but six wings are normally $8.49 near me in Los Angeles, while 20 wings are $24.99. Other national deals at KFC right now include:
$10 Tuesday - 8 pieces of fried chicken (leg and thighs) or 8 tenders for $10 on Tuesdays. $20 Build-A-Bucket - 8 pieces of fried dark meat chicken or 8 tenders, plus 4 individual sides and 4 buttermilk biscuits for $20.
Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pizza Hut Introduces New Hand-Tossed Pizza Crust and Space Jam Triple Treat Box
entry.summary:
Pizza Hut updates its Hand-Tossed Crust with a new recipe and launches the new Space Jam x Triple Treat Box to celebrate the basketball movie's 30th anniversary (and coinciding with March Madness).
Pizza Hut's new Hand Tossed Crust marks the chain's first recipe update in over a decade. It features a "lighter, airier bite with just the right balance of softness and crisp." It's finished with the chain's Garlic-Parm Hut Blend (you can opt to get it without the seasoning). It's featured in a new $10 large 3-topping pizza deal and in the Space Jam x Triple Treat Box. The new $10 large 3-topping pizza deal ($10.99 here in California) is a limited-time offer at participating locations nationwide, where you can get a large 3-topping pizza on new Hand-Tossed crust, Thin 'N Crispy, or Chicago Tavern Style. It replaces a similar deal that allowed up to five toppings. The Space Jam x Triple Treat Box includes two medium 1-topping pizzas, breadsticks, and Cinnamon Sticks (other desserts are available for an additional charge) in a limited-edition Space Jam-themed box at participating locations. Pricing starts at $21.99 (it's $24.99 near me).
Photos via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.summary:
Crumbl introduces the new Brookies & Cream Cookie featuring Oreo as part of this week's limited-time lineup from March 23 through March 28, 2026.
Here are the four desserts on this week's rotating menu at Crumbl: - New Brookies & Cream Cookie featuring Oreo (pictured) - A whole Oreo cookie stuffed inside a warm brookie, topped with Oreo cookie pieces. - Dubai Chocolate Brownie - A chilled fudge brownie with a kataifi and pistachio cream filling topped with a layer of milk chocolate and a drizzle of more pistachio cream. - Cake Batter Blondie Cookie - A warm cake batter cookie packed with white drops, rimmed with rainbow sprinkles. - Carrot Cake Cookie - A warm, spiced carrot cake topped with cream cheese frosting and a pecan garnish. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!
